raw_sql:
SELECT caller_id, COUNT(*) as ticket_count
FROM flag_8
GROUP BY caller_id
ORDER BY ticket_count DESC
LIMIT 20
template:
SELECT caller_id, COUNT(*) as ticket_count
FROM flag_8
GROUP BY caller_id
ORDER BY ticket_count DESC
LIMIT ?n

raw_sql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month, caller_id, COUNT(*) AS ticket_count
FROM flag_8
WHERE caller_id IN ('David Loo', 'Bud Richman', 'ITIL User', 'Don Goodliffe')
GROUP BY month, caller_id
ORDER BY month, caller_id
template:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month, caller_id, COUNT(*) AS ticket_count
FROM flag_8
WHERE caller_id IN (?s, ?s, ?s, ?s)
GROUP BY month, caller_id
ORDER BY month, caller_id

raw_sql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN caller_id = 'David Loo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS david_loo,
       SUM(CASE WHEN caller_id != 'David Loo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS all_others
FROM flag_8
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month
template:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN caller_id = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS david_loo,
       SUM(CASE WHEN caller_id != ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS all_others
FROM flag_8
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN caller_id = 'David Loo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS david_loo,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN caller_id = 'David Loo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS david_pct,
    ROUND(
        REGR_SLOPE(
            SUM(CASE WHEN caller_id = 'David Loo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)),
            EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)) / (86400*30)
        ) OVER (ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW),
    2) AS running_slope
FROM flag_8
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month
template:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN caller_id = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS david_loo,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN caller_id = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS david_pct,
    ROUND(
        REGR_SLOPE(
            SUM(CASE WHEN caller_id = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) OVER (ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)),
            EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)) / (?n*?n)
        ) OVER (ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW),
    ?n) AS running_slope
FROM flag_8
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month

raw_sql:
WITH monthly AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
        SUM(CASE WHEN caller_id = 'David Loo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS david_loo,
        COUNT(*) AS total
    FROM flag_8
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
)
SELECT 
    month,
    david_loo,
    total,
    ROUND(100.0 * david_loo / total, 1) AS david_pct,
    david_loo - LAG(david_loo) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS mom_change
FROM monthly
ORDER BY month
template:
WITH monthly AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
        SUM(CASE WHEN caller_id = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS david_loo,
        COUNT(*) AS total
    FROM flag_8
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)
)
SELECT 
    month,
    david_loo,
    total,
    ROUND(?n * david_loo / total, ?n) AS david_pct,
    david_loo - LAG(david_loo) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS mom_change
FROM monthly
ORDER BY month

raw_sql:
WITH monthly AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
        SUM(CASE WHEN caller_id = 'David Loo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS david_loo,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)) AS month_num
    FROM flag_8
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
)
SELECT 
    ROUND(REGR_SLOPE(david_loo, month_num)::numeric, 3) AS tickets_per_month_slope,
    ROUND(REGR_INTERCEPT(david_loo, month_num)::numeric, 2) AS intercept,
    ROUND(REGR_R2(david_loo, month_num)::numeric, 4) AS r_squared,
    MIN(david_loo) AS min_monthly,
    MAX(david_loo) AS max_monthly,
    ROUND(AVG(david_loo), 2) AS avg_monthly
FROM monthly
template:
WITH monthly AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
        SUM(CASE WHEN caller_id = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS david_loo,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)) AS month_num
    FROM flag_8
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)
)
SELECT 
    ROUND(REGR_SLOPE(david_loo, month_num)::numeric, ?n) AS tickets_per_month_slope,
    ROUND(REGR_INTERCEPT(david_loo, month_num)::numeric, ?n) AS intercept,
    ROUND(REGR_R2(david_loo, month_num)::numeric, ?n) AS r_squared,
    MIN(david_loo) AS min_monthly,
    MAX(david_loo) AS max_monthly,
    ROUND(AVG(david_loo), ?n) AS avg_monthly
FROM monthly

raw_sql:
WITH david_monthly AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
        category,
        COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM flag_8
    WHERE caller_id = 'David Loo'
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at), category
)
SELECT 
    month,
    category,
    cnt,
    ROUND(100.0 * cnt / SUM(cnt) OVER (PARTITION BY month), 1) AS pct_of_month
FROM david_monthly
ORDER BY month, cnt DESC
template:
WITH david_monthly AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
        category,
        COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM flag_8
    WHERE caller_id = ?s
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at), category
)
SELECT 
    month,
    category,
    cnt,
    ROUND(?n * cnt / SUM(cnt) OVER (PARTITION BY month), ?n) AS pct_of_month
FROM david_monthly
ORDER BY month, cnt DESC

raw_sql:
WITH david_monthly AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
        category,
        COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM flag_8
    WHERE caller_id = 'David Loo'
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at), category
),
category_totals AS (
    SELECT category, SUM(cnt) AS total_cnt
    FROM david_monthly
    GROUP BY category
),
category_trend AS (
    SELECT 
        dm.category,
        ROUND(REGR_SLOPE(dm.cnt, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM dm.month) / (86400*30))::numeric, 3) AS slope
    FROM david_monthly dm
    GROUP BY dm.category
)
SELECT 
    ct.category,
    ct.total_cnt,
    ctr.slope AS tickets_per_month_slope
FROM category_totals ct
JOIN category_trend ctr ON ct.category = ctr.category
ORDER BY ctr.slope DESC
template:
WITH david_monthly AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
        category,
        COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM flag_8
    WHERE caller_id = ?s
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at), category
),
category_totals AS (
    SELECT category, SUM(cnt) AS total_cnt
    FROM david_monthly
    GROUP BY category
),
category_trend AS (
    SELECT 
        dm.category,
        ROUND(REGR_SLOPE(dm.cnt, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM dm.month) / (?n*?n))::numeric, ?n) AS slope
    FROM david_monthly dm
    GROUP BY dm.category
)
SELECT 
    ct.category,
    ct.total_cnt,
    ctr.slope AS tickets_per_month_slope
FROM category_totals ct
JOIN category_trend ctr ON ct.category = ctr.category
ORDER BY ctr.slope DESC

raw_sql:
WITH caller_monthly AS (
    SELECT 
        caller_id,
        DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM flag_8
    GROUP BY caller_id, DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        caller_id,
        cnt,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY cnt DESC) AS rnk
    FROM caller_monthly
)
SELECT 
    month,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rnk = 1 THEN caller_id END) AS top_caller,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rnk = 1 THEN cnt END) AS top_cnt,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rnk = 2 THEN caller_id END) AS second_caller,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rnk = 2 THEN cnt END) AS second_cnt,
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN rnk = 1 THEN cnt END)::numeric / NULLIF(MAX(CASE WHEN rnk = 2 THEN cnt END), 0), 2) AS imbalance_ratio
FROM ranked
WHERE rnk <= 2
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month
template:
WITH caller_monthly AS (
    SELECT 
        caller_id,
        DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM flag_8
    GROUP BY caller_id, DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        caller_id,
        cnt,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY cnt DESC) AS rnk
    FROM caller_monthly
)
SELECT 
    month,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rnk = ?n THEN caller_id END) AS top_caller,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rnk = ?n THEN cnt END) AS top_cnt,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rnk = ?n THEN caller_id END) AS second_caller,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rnk = ?n THEN cnt END) AS second_cnt,
    ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN rnk = ?n THEN cnt END)::numeric / NULLIF(MAX(CASE WHEN rnk = ?n THEN cnt END), ?n), ?n) AS imbalance_ratio
FROM ranked
WHERE rnk <= ?n
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month
